Correllia spectabilis, also known as Correllita, is a type of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, and its health benefits include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce stress, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The most common herbal preparations made with Correllia spectabilis are teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.

More research is needed to fully understand its classification and distribution.
